biography: Mikael, a familiar name to followers of Kurk Golf, is known for his thoughtful approach to the game. Though seemingly reserved at first glance, those who know Mikael speak of a golfer with a fierce competitive spirit and a relentless drive for improvement.

While Mikael has only graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée once, his presence was certainly noted. Although he is considered retired from the competition, one never knows if the allure of the Trophée might bring him back into contention.
Whether he chooses to return to the competitive arena or not, Mikael's impact on the local golf scene is undeniable, and his contributions to Kurk Golf are deeply appreciated.
